description: step3-write-markdown.test.ts tests dispatchSaveRequest from dispatch-save-request.ts, which is dead code never imported by the pipeline. The actual Step 3 logic (SaveNoteRequested emission, file write, NoteFileSaved/NoteSaveFailed emission) is inlined in pipeline.ts:103-149. REQ-007 through REQ-010 and PROP-007 through PROP-011 are therefore tested against dead code, not the actual implementation. The pipeline integration tests in pipeline.test.ts cover some of these behaviors but not all — for example, the FsError-to-NoteSaveFailureReason mapping (PROP-008) is only tested in the dead-code test file, not against the pipeline's own mapFsErrorToReason at pipeline.ts:166-173.
